---
title: "Outreach"
description: "Selected outreach activity, public talks, videos, posters, and downloadable slides."
---

## Talks & Events

::: {.media-entry}
[![](assets/img/slides/outreach/las_galaxias_que_vemos_y_que_nunca_alcanzaremos.png){.media-thumb fig-alt="Thumbnail for Las galaxias que vemos y que nunca alcanzaremos"}](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e7X5LF4FuOo&ab_channel=IkerketaZabalik)

::: {.media-body}
::: {.media-meta}
2022 · Outreach
:::

### Scientific Monologue: *Las galaxias que vemos y que nunca alcanzaremos*

12/11/2022 · Zientzia Astea UPV/EHU, Spain

::: {.media-actions}
[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e7X5LF4FuOo&ab_channel=IkerketaZabalik){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
[Slides PDF](assets/files/slides/outreach/las_galaxias_que_vemos_y_que_nunca_alcanzaremos.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.media-entry}
[![](assets/img/talks/ML_PastPresentFuture.png){.media-thumb fig-alt="Thumbnail for Machine Learning Applications in Cosmology: Past, Present, and Future"}](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oZOMmPZpBAs)

::: {.media-body}
::: {.media-meta}
Video
:::

### Machine Learning Applications in Cosmology: Past, Present, and Future

A public-facing video presentation on machine-learning applications in cosmology.

::: {.media-actions}
[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oZOMmPZpBAs){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.media-entry}
[![](assets/img/talks/strom.png){.media-thumb fig-alt="Thumbnail for STROM inclusive astronomy exhibition"}](https://dipc.ehu.eus/es/ciencia-sociedad/passion-for-knowledge/x)

::: {.media-body}
::: {.media-meta}
2023 · Guide
:::

### Astronomical Exhibition Guide: STROM – Inclusive Astronomy

04/10/2023–31/10/2023 · Tabakalera, Donostia / San Sebastián, Spain

::: {.media-actions}
[Project page](https://dipc.ehu.eus/es/ciencia-sociedad/passion-for-knowledge/x){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.media-entry}
[![](assets/img/talks/meet_a_scientist.png){.media-thumb fig-alt="Thumbnail for Meet a Scientist"}](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPnlDaMSb0U&ab_channel=Eureka%21ZientziaMuseoaDonostia-SanSebasti%C3%A1n)

::: {.media-body}
::: {.media-meta}
2021–2024 · Outreach
:::

### Meet a Scientist: “Encuentro de vidas científicas”

25/10/2021, 08/11/2022, 17/10/2022 & 24/10/2024 · Eureka! Zientzia Museoa, Spain

::: {.media-actions}
[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPnlDaMSb0U&ab_channel=Eureka%21ZientziaMuseoaDonostia-SanSebasti%C3%A1n){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

## Posters

::: {.doc-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
[![](assets/img/posters/poster_telescopes_and_detectors.png){.doc-thumb fig-alt="Poster preview: Telescopes and detectors"}](assets/files/posters/poster_telescopes_and_detectors.pdf)

::: {.doc-body}
### Telescopes and Detectors

Poster material in PDF format.

::: {.media-actions}
[Download PDF](assets/files/posters/poster_telescopes_and_detectors.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.doc-card}
[![](assets/img/posters/poster_computational_cosmology.png){.doc-thumb fig-alt="Poster preview: Computational cosmology"}](assets/files/posters/poster_computational_cosmology.pdf)

::: {.doc-body}
### Computational Cosmology

Poster material in PDF format.

::: {.media-actions}
[Download PDF](assets/files/posters/poster_computational_cosmology.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.doc-card}
[![](assets/img/posters/poster_instance_segmentation.png){.doc-thumb fig-alt="Poster preview: Instance segmentation"}](assets/files/posters/poster_instance_segmentation.pdf)

::: {.doc-body}
### Instance Segmentation

Poster material in PDF format.

::: {.media-actions}
[Download PDF](assets/files/posters/poster_instance_segmentation.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::
:::

## Slides

::: {.slide-grid}
::: {.slide-card}
[![](assets/img/slides/outreach/Bestiario_Estelar.png){.slide-thumb fig-alt="Slide preview: Bestiario Estelar"}](assets/files/slides/outreach/Bestiario_Estelar.pdf)

::: {.slide-body}
### Bestiario Estelar

Slide deck associated with the scientific monologue.

::: {.media-actions}
[Download PDF](assets/files/slides/outreach/Bestiario_Estelar.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.slide-card}
[![](assets/img/slides/outreach/las_galaxias_que_vemos_y_que_nunca_alcanzaremos.png){.slide-thumb fig-alt="Slide preview: Las galaxias que vemos y que nunca alcanzaremos"}](assets/files/slides/outreach/las_galaxias_que_vemos_y_que_nunca_alcanzaremos.pdf)

::: {.slide-body}
### Las galaxias que vemos y que nunca alcanzaremos

Slide deck associated with the scientific monologue.

::: {.media-actions}
[Download PDF](assets/files/slides/outreach/las_galaxias_que_vemos_y_que_nunca_alcanzaremos.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-info .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::
:::
